fragility_points: Residual downside over ~42 hours is large enough to matter for a threshold market.
Official settlement surface is Binance chart/UI rather than the API used for verification.
key_assumptions: BTC retains enough cushion above 70000 into the exact 2026-04-15 12:00 ET Binance 1m close.
No Binance-specific dislocation or wick meaningfully distorts the governing close.
main_logical_chain: Verify the exact resolution mechanics from Polymarket and convert the settlement time to 2026-04-15 16:00 UTC.
Check Binance BTC/USDT spot, recent klines, and 24h range to measure current cushion above 70000.
Conclude that Yes is favored but trim confidence below market because narrow timing and Binance-specific path risk are still nontrivial.
main_thesis: Yes is still the likelier outcome because Binance BTC/USDT is currently well above 70000, but the market slightly underprices narrow timestamp and exchange-specific tail risk.
quote_anchors: This market will resolve to 'Yes' if the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) ... has a final 'Close' price higher than the price specified in the title.
source_quality_view: Primary source quality is strong for contract mechanics and current price context, but evidence independence is only medium-low because both key inputs ultimately center on Binance-defined pricing.
strongest_disconfirmers: This is a single-minute, single-venue contract, so a sharp drawdown or noon-minute reversal can still resolve No.
A roughly 5.7% move down from current spot would be enough to miss.
strongest_supports: Binance BTC/USDT traded around 74230 during the run, leaving about 4.2k cushion above the threshold.
Binance 24h low during the verification pass remained above 70000.
Polymarket rules are explicit about exchange, pair, candle interval, and close-field mechanics.
timing_relevance: The market resolves on the single Binance BTC/USDT 1m close at 12:00 ET on 2026-04-15, so path and minute-level timing matter more than general bullishness.
unresolved_ambiguities: How much realized volatility will occur before the exact noon ET minute.
Whether Binance shows any exchange-specific irregularity near settlement.
what_would_change_view: A move toward 71k or below before settlement, narrowing cushion, or Binance-specific irregularity would push me further from the market; BTC staying comfortably above 72k-73k near noon ET would move me closer to it.
